text.title: Gcp Billing Cost Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-billing-cost methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: set-budgets
step.action: Create budget alerts (50/90/100%) per project; route via Pub/Sub.

step.name: analyse
step.action: Run cost report by service / team / env; identify top drivers + savings.

step.name: act-and-track
step.action: Action idle resources + Recommender; evaluate CUDs.
